name: git
description: Git worktree and branching utilities for rebasing and atomic commits.

interface.shortDescription: Git commit and rebase helpers for multi-worktree repos.
interface.longDescription: Utilities for creating atomic commits and rebasing feature worktrees back onto the root repository branch.
defaultPrompt: Use git:commit to create an atomic conventional commit for my current changes.
Use git:rebase-to-root to rebase this worktree onto the root repo branch.
